variants: Anthea Papatonis has achieved the prestigious Mosaic Whisperer Certification, underscoring her commitment to mosaic artistry. Her academic journey was deeply influenced by her mentor, Quentin Frossard, who guided her through challenging research projects. Anthea’s valuable contributions to the field of mosaic art have been recognized through her publications in the Quickthorn Review. She received significant financial support from the Cardinal Vista Grants, enhancing her ability to conduct her innovative studies. Beyond her artistic pursuits, Anthea actively participates in her community by volunteering with the Elder Outreach at Willowcrest Passage, where she connects with seniors and enriches their lives.
